host.description: Hostname or IP of the SSH jump/utility node to execute on.

private_key.description: PEM-encoded private key used for authentication. Stored as a secret.

host_pubkey.description: Server host public key line for known_hosts pinning, e.g. 'ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3Nz...' (get it with `ssh-keyscan -t ed25519 <host>`). When set, the wrapper enforces StrictHostKeyChecking=yes. When empty, execution is refused unless accept_unknown_host is true.

accept_unknown_host.description: Allow connecting without a pinned host_pubkey by trusting the host key on first use (StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new). Insecure against MITM — development only.

description: Target host reachable over SSH for the lightweight SSH execution wrapper. See examples/usecase/ssh-execution-wrapper/README.md.
